2344180.name: Realm Divided
2344180.description:
Tactical Hex-Based Gameplay

Engage in deep, strategic gameplay as you gather resources, build fortifications, and marshal your forces in this turn-based strategy game. Each match is kept fresh and unpredictable as you gather faith and use abilities that can change the nature of events on the battlefield.

Competitive Multiplayer

Compete against fellow players in a quick-paced but tactical battle to wrest control of the aurin crystals and power your lodestone before the other player.

             

Story-Driven Singleplayer

Explore the ancient conflict between the noble Sentinels and the infernal hordes of The Fallen as you fight over The Crossing, a breach in the impenetrable barrier that has separated the two forces for hundreds of years.
2344180.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
